about.title: A family estate, a personal welcome
about.p1: Domaine de Rochebonne is our former family property in Charente-Maritime, gradually transformed into a holiday estate. We live here with Johanna and personally welcome every guest.
about.p2: The estate comprises a château and 8 independent cottages, all gathered within a walled park of 13,000 m², spaced 5 to 50 metres apart. Ideal for groups booking several cottages side by side.
about.p3: In total, the estate accommodates up to 61 guests in the cottages alone, plus the private château, for 9 accommodations in all.
about.paymentBanner: Pay in 3 instalments with us, or in 10 with PayPal · Holiday vouchers accepted · Flexible cancellation

accommodations.title: Find your stay
accommodations.subtitle: From a cosy studio to a private château, choose the accommodation that suits your group.
accommodations.pageSubtitle: 10 independent houses spread across a 13,000 m² enclosed park, from 2 to 68 guests.

chateau.name: 8-bedroom château with private pool
chateau.description: The standout experience of the estate. Fully private château with a heated pool with no overlooking neighbours, large living room, library and games room. Ideal for large families, weddings and reunions.
highlights: Separate from the rest of the estate

la-charrue.name: La Charrue — 4-bedroom house
la-charrue.description: Large family house with private garden, terrace and access to the estate's shared facilities.

le-pressoir.name: Le Pressoir — 3-bedroom house
le-pressoir.description: Charming house for 8 guests, perfect for a stay with friends or family.

la-cave.name: La Cave — 3-bedroom house
la-cave.description: Welcoming house for 6 guests, at the heart of the estate's wooded park.

maison-piscine-privee.name: 4-bedroom house with private pool
maison-piscine-privee.description: Spacious house with its own private pool, for a premium stay in complete privacy.

le-chai.name: Le Chai — 2-bedroom cottage
le-chai.description: Cosy cottage for 4 guests, ideal for a couple or small family.

la-mangeoire.name: La Mangeoire — 2-bedroom cottage
la-mangeoire.description: Former outbuilding restored with charm and modern comfort.

le-four-a-pain.name: Le Four à Pain — 2-bedroom cottage
le-four-a-pain.description: Character cottage in a historic building on the estate.

la-chaumiere.name: La Chaumière — 1-bedroom cottage
la-chaumiere.description: Cosy single-level retreat, perfect for two or a party of three.

le-studio.name: Le Studio — 2 guests
le-studio.description: Compact, functional accommodation for a couple.

pressoir-cave.name: Large cottage 14 guests — Le Pressoir & La Cave
pressoir-cave.description: Combination of two adjacent houses to host a large group while keeping separate living spaces.

domaine-entier.name: The entire Domaine de Rochebonne
domaine-entier.description: Privatise the entire estate for an exceptional event: wedding, seminar or large family gathering.

region.title: Between ocean and countryside
region.subtitle: Beaches, Île d'Oléron, oyster farming and heritage: everything is within 35 minutes of the estate.
region.pageSubtitle: Between the Atlantic Ocean, Île d'Oléron and the picturesque villages of south-west France, a region full of discoveries.
region.onDomainText: No need to go far to have fun: 2 heated pools, pétanque, ping-pong, badminton, football pitch, children's play areas with slides, sandpit and swings. The 13,000 m² park is fully enclosed.

oleron.name: Île d'Oléron
oleron.description: The largest island on France's Atlantic coast: wild beaches, oyster ports, cycling along the shoreline and typical villages such as Saint-Georges-d'Oléron.

rochelle.name: La Rochelle
rochelle.description: Historic port with its medieval towers, lively Old Port, aquarium and covered market. An ideal starting point for exploring Charente-Maritime.

royan.name: Royan
royan.description: Renowned seaside resort with fine sandy beaches, 1950s architecture and summer events along the Atlantic coast.

palmyre.name: La Palmyre Zoo
palmyre.description: One of Europe's largest zoos, nestled in the Coubre forest. A must for families, just steps from the beaches of Saint-Palais-sur-Mer.

marennes.name: Marennes-Oléron
marennes.description: The oyster capital of Charente-Maritime: oyster trail, tastings in cabanes and salt marshes listed as regional heritage.

rochefort.name: Rochefort
rochefort.description: City of art and history with the Corderie Royale, the Hermione and the transporter bridge. Gateway to Île d'Aix and Fort Boyard.

testimonials.title: What our guests say
testimonials.seeAllGoogle: See all our reviews on Google

items.name: Yoann Kabas
items.text: An absolutely perfect stay! Welcomed with warmth and professionalism by William and Johanna. The setting is splendid: a large green park, secure play areas for children. The château is very well equipped, clean and comfortable. We highly recommend it!

items.name: Sarah Haoussine
items.text: We came in the middle of winter and our hosts were fantastic. The charm of the wood stove, with a little DIY help from William.

items.name: Valentine Foret-Bruno
items.text: A lovely, authentic large house! Beautiful spaces for a family weekend of 15. Stunning beaches 20 minutes away. A warm welcome.

items.name: Aurélie Capdevielle
items.text: An enchanting 4-day stay in a magnificent place! The château is perfectly located for exploring the region: marshes, Île d'Oléron, oyster farming. We highly recommend it.

items.name: Pascale Beauchamps
items.text: A wonderful family weekend in this château that hosted our whole family of 13. Comfort, spacious rooms and a magnificent setting.

items.name: Florence
items.text: A very pleasant stay in a fully equipped cottage in the middle of a beautiful enclosed, wooded park. Ideal for families and pets.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to plan your stay

items.question: How do I get to Domaine de Rochebonne?
items.answer: The estate is located in Saint-Just-Luzac (17320), Charente-Maritime. By car: 25 min from Rochefort, 35 min from La Rochelle, 20 min from Royan. By train: La Rochelle TGV station (35 min) or Rochefort station (25 min). By plane: La Rochelle – Île de Ré airport (35 min). Free parking for over 20 vehicles is available on site.

items.question: What is included in the rate?
items.answer: The rate includes fully equipped accommodation, a private garden with terrace and barbecue, access to 2 heated pools, the 13,000 m² park, play areas and sports facilities (pétanque, ping-pong, badminton, football pitch), Wi-Fi and free parking. Optional extras: bed linen kits (€6–8), towels (€3/person), pool towel (€4).

items.question: Are pets allowed?
items.answer: Yes, pets are welcome. The 13,000 m² enclosed park provides a secure space for your companions. Dog-friendly beaches are nearby. We ask that you keep your pets under supervision and clean up after them in shared areas.

items.question: Are the pools heated all year round?
items.answer: Our two pools are heated from May to September, with water temperature maintained between 26°C and 28°C. Out of season, the pools remain accessible but are not heated.

items.question: What is the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Super Flexible policy: cancellation 35 days or more before arrival → 100% refund. Between 25 and 34 days → 50% refund. Less than 25 days → no refund. Payment in 3 instalments: 35% on booking, 30% at 60 days, balance at 30 days.

items.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
items.answer: Check-in from 3:00 pm. Check-out before 10:00 am. If you need different times, contact us and we will do our best to accommodate you.

items.question: What is the minimum stay?
items.answer: In high season (July–August), the minimum stay is 7 nights. Out of season, shorter stays are possible from 2 nights depending on availability. Reduced rates for longer stays: from -16% to -65% depending on duration.

items.question: Can we book several cottages for a group?
items.answer: Absolutely — it is one of the estate's strengths. With 10 independent cottages and a château, we can accommodate from 2 to 68 guests. Each family has its own accommodation with a private garden, while sharing common areas. Contact us for a personalised group quote.

items.question: Is the estate suitable for a wedding or event?
items.answer: Yes, Domaine de Rochebonne is ideal for weddings, seminars and events. We can host up to 80 guests with on-site accommodation. The 13,000 m² park and two pools provide an exceptional setting for ceremonies and receptions.

items.question: What activities are nearby?
items.answer: On the estate: 2 heated pools, pétanque, ping-pong, badminton, football pitch, play areas. Nearby (10–30 min): Atlantic beaches, Île d'Oléron, Marennes oyster route, La Palmyre Zoo, Fort Louvois, Rochefort Corderie Royale, La Rochelle, Mornac-sur-Seudre. Water sports: kayaking, surfing, sailing, sand yachting.

cta.title: Ready for your next holiday?
cta.subtitle: Book online or contact William and Johanna for a personalised group or event quote.

discover.heroTitle: A peaceful haven between ocean and countryside
discover.section1p1: Our holiday homes, set on spacious grounds with pools, play areas and more, are at your disposal. Just 5 km from the Atlantic in Charente-Maritime, Rochebonne offers 10 well-equipped houses, including a charming château, spread across 13,000 m² of enclosed gardens with two pools.
discover.section1p2: Each cottage has a private garden, a furnished terrace with barbecue, and direct access to the shared gardens and a fenced pool. We also offer a fully private château with its own pool and grounds.
discover.facilitiesp1: On-site facilities include a children's play area with wooden fort, sandpit, swings, games, badminton net and football pitch.
discover.facilitiesp2: The property is fully fenced, ensuring children's safety while parents relax. Fast, reliable Wi-Fi is available throughout the estate.
discover.facilitiesp3: Domaine de Rochebonne is close to picturesque towns such as La Rochelle, Rochefort, Royan, Saintes and Saint-Palais-sur-Mer, all easily accessible by car.
discover.hostsText: We live on site and personally welcome all our guests. On arrival, we show you around the estate and remain available throughout your stay to answer any questions.

events.heroTitle: An exceptional venue for unforgettable moments
events.heroSubtitle: Weddings, seminars, birthdays: host up to 80 guests with on-site accommodation in a unique setting.
events.sectionSubtitle: The 13,000 m² enclosed park, two pools and variety of accommodations make Domaine de Rochebonne an ideal place to celebrate in style.
capacityItems: Up to 80 guests for an event with on-site accommodation
Château available for privatisation for 15 to 20 guests
events.quoteText: Every event is unique. Contact William and Johanna to discuss your project and receive a proposal tailored to your needs.

wedding.title: Weddings
wedding.description: An exceptional setting for your big day: 13,000 m² park, two pools, privatisable château and accommodation for all your guests on site.

seminar.title: Seminars & team building
seminar.description: Flexible spaces for corporate meetings, with accommodation for 2 to 68 guests and sports facilities for group activities.

birthday.title: Birthdays & celebrations
birthday.description: Bring family and friends together in a private setting. Several adjacent cottages allow each family to keep their privacy.

privatization.title: Full estate privatisation
privatization.description: Book the entire estate for a tailor-made event. Personalised quote based on your needs and number of guests.

contact.title: Let's talk about your stay
contact.subtitle: A question, a group quote or an event project? William and Johanna will reply personally.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: Domaine de Rochebonne is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its website https://ledomainederochebonne.com.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.content: We only collect data that you voluntarily provide through the contact form (name, email, message) or when making an online booking.

sections.title: Use of data
sections.content: Your data is used exclusively to respond to your requests, manage your bookings and improve our services. It is never sold to third parties.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at info@domainederochebonne.com.
